description: Verso: Draft of a petition in Arabic script, addressed to a lower official. The petitioners raise a dispute regarding a synagogue (kanīsa). They are barred from entering and using it and ask that a decree for the same be issued from the al-majlis al-karīm. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
